description: Fungal disease causing dark scabby lesions on apple leaves and fruit.
prevention: Remove fallen leaves. Apply fungicide sprays. Plant resistant varieties.

description: Fungal disease causing brown rotting of fruit and leaf spots.
prevention: Prune infected branches. Apply copper-based fungicides. Ensure good air circulation.

description: Fungal disease causing orange rust spots on apple leaves and fruit.
prevention: Remove nearby cedar trees. Apply fungicide in spring. Plant resistant varieties.

description: The apple plant is healthy with no visible signs of disease.
prevention: Water regularly. Ensure proper sunlight. Apply balanced fertilizer seasonally.

description: The blueberry plant is healthy with no visible signs of disease.
prevention: Maintain acidic soil pH 4.5-5.5. Mulch around base. Prune dead canes annually.

description: Fungal disease causing white powdery coating on cherry leaves.
prevention: Improve air circulation. Avoid overhead watering. Apply sulfur-based fungicide.

description: The cherry plant is healthy with no visible signs of disease.
prevention: Prune for airflow. Water at base. Monitor for pests regularly.

description: Fungal disease causing gray rectangular lesions on corn leaves.
prevention: Rotate crops. Plant resistant hybrids. Apply fungicide at early symptoms.

description: Fungal disease causing reddish-brown pustules on corn leaves.
prevention: Plant rust-resistant hybrids. Apply fungicide early. Avoid dense planting.

description: Fungal disease causing large cigar-shaped lesions on corn leaves.
prevention: Use resistant varieties. Rotate crops. Apply foliar fungicide.

description: The corn plant is healthy with no visible signs of disease.
prevention: Ensure proper spacing. Balanced nitrogen fertilization. Monitor soil moisture.

description: Fungal disease causing brown spots and black mummified fruit on grapes.
prevention: Remove mummified fruit. Apply fungicide from bud break. Prune for airflow.

description: Fungal vascular disease causing tiger-striped leaves and berry shriveling.
prevention: Remove infected wood. Protect pruning wounds. Avoid water stress.

description: Fungal disease causing dark angular spots on grape leaves.
prevention: Apply copper fungicide. Improve canopy airflow. Remove infected leaves.

description: The grape vine is healthy with no visible signs of disease.
prevention: Train vines properly. Ensure good drainage. Apply balanced fertilizer.

description: Bacterial disease spread by psyllids causing yellow shoots and misshapen fruit.
prevention: Control psyllid insects. Remove infected trees. Use certified disease-free plants.

description: Bacterial disease causing small dark spots on peach leaves and fruit.
prevention: Apply copper bactericide in fall. Plant resistant varieties. Avoid overhead irrigation.

description: The peach tree is healthy with no visible signs of disease.
prevention: Thin fruit early. Fertilize in spring. Monitor for peach leaf curl.

description: _bell___Bacterial_spot
prevention: Bacterial disease causing water-soaked spots on pepper leaves and fruit.
supplement: Use disease-free seeds. Apply copper bactericide. Avoid working with wet plants.

description: _bell___healthy
prevention: The bell pepper plant is healthy with no visible signs of disease.
supplement: Water consistently. Stake plants. Apply calcium fertilizer to prevent blossom drop.

description: Fungal disease causing dark concentric ring spots on potato leaves.
prevention: Rotate crops every 3 years. Apply chlorothalonil fungicide. Remove infected foliage.

description: Devastating fungal disease causing rapid brown decay of potato foliage.
prevention: Plant certified seed potatoes. Apply mancozeb preventatively. Destroy infected plants.

description: The potato plant is healthy with no visible signs of disease.
prevention: Hill soil around stems. Maintain even moisture. Watch for colorado beetle.

description: The raspberry plant is healthy with no visible signs of disease.
prevention: Prune old canes after harvest. Mulch for moisture retention. Fertilize in spring.

description: The soybean plant is healthy with no visible signs of disease.
prevention: Rotate with non-legumes. Monitor for aphids and stink bugs. Inoculate with rhizobia.

description: Fungal disease causing white powdery coating on squash leaves.
prevention: Space plants for airflow. Apply potassium bicarbonate spray. Water at base only.

description: Fungal disease causing purple-bordered spots on strawberry leaves.
prevention: Remove infected leaves. Apply fungicide in spring. Use resistant varieties.

description: The strawberry plant is healthy with no visible signs of disease.
prevention: Renovate beds after harvest. Apply balanced fertilizer. Use straw mulch.

description: Bacterial disease causing small water-soaked spots on tomato leaves and fruit.
prevention: Use copper bactericide spray. Avoid overhead watering. Use disease-free transplants.

description: Fungal disease causing dark spots with concentric rings on lower tomato leaves.
prevention: Remove lower leaves. Apply chlorothalonil fungicide. Stake plants for airflow.

description: Serious fungal disease causing water-soaked lesions on tomato foliage.
prevention: Apply mancozeb preventatively. Remove and destroy infected plants.

description: Fungal disease causing pale green to yellow spots on upper tomato leaf surfaces.
prevention: Improve greenhouse ventilation. Reduce humidity. Apply fungicide spray.

description: Fungal disease causing small circular spots with dark borders on tomato leaves.
prevention: Remove infected leaves. Apply chlorothalonil. Practice crop rotation.

description: Arachnid pest causing stippled yellowing on tomato leaves with fine webbing.
prevention: Apply neem oil or insecticidal soap. Increase humidity. Introduce predatory mites.

description: Fungal disease causing brown spots with concentric rings on tomato foliage.
prevention: Apply azoxystrobin fungicide. Maintain plant spacing. Remove infected debris.

description: Viral disease spread by whiteflies causing leaf curling and yellowing in tomatoes.
prevention: Control whiteflies with insecticidal soap. Use reflective mulch. Plant resistant varieties.

description: Viral disease causing mottled yellow-green mosaic patterns on tomato leaves.
prevention: Remove infected plants. Disinfect tools. Control aphid vectors.

description: The tomato plant is healthy with no visible signs of disease.
prevention: Water at base. Stake or cage plants. Fertilize with tomato-specific fertilizer.
